economic_hypothesis: Direction models are unreliable when the pre-trade liquidity state does not permit a move large enough to overcome costs. A separate hazard model should first identify high-information, high-impact states from L2 depth, VPIN, Hawkes intensities, aggressive flow and open interest. Conditional on that state, direction is estimated independently and filtered through continuation, absorption, or unrestricted routing.

data.feature_revision_policy: Resolve and freeze one immutable repository SHA before downloading development data; all later stages must verify the same SHA and file hashes.

causality.decision: Feature values from completed five-minute bar t only.
causality.normalization: Model imputers and scalers are fit on training data only.
causality.walkforward: Monthly retraining; training labels are purged by the prediction horizon and calibration precedes the test month.
causality.daily_boundary: UTC 00:00; non-trading days remain in the equity path.
causality.missing_bars: Any feature, label or holding path crossing a missing five-minute bar is invalid.
causality.day_boundary_state: First 90 minutes of each UTC day are excluded to remove possible daily-file VPIN/Hawkes state-reset artifacts.
causality.oi: Dataset OI features are treated as available at bar close and therefore can affect only the next bar.
causality.same_bar: Protective stop has adverse priority; no favorable target is used.
causality.2025_gate: 2025 files are not loaded unless a single primary passes all 2024 selection gates.

development_gate.mandatory_diversity: At most one representative per hazard-model, direction-model, horizon and routing-filter tuple before filling remaining slots.

prohibitions: No 2025 access before a frozen 2024 primary exists.
No target-return, leverage or risk fitting.
No paper, testnet or live orders.
No complete deployment bundle unless the target gate and all pre-live audits pass.
